title: Excel Spreadsheet (Legacy)
documentation:
## Purpose
Carries legacy Microsoft Excel spreadsheets in the binary BIFF format (`.xls`) used by Excel 97 through Excel 2003. This format is still present in archival datasets and systems that predate the Open XML transition.

## When to use
Use `media:xls` when a pipeline node must handle old-format Excel files — for example, a data ingestion step using `xlrd` or LibreOffice to read legacy spreadsheets, or an archival conversion step targeting XLSX. For current Excel files, prefer [Excel Spreadsheet](https://capdag.com/browse/media:xlsx).

## Notes
The `xlrd` library dropped `.xls` support in newer versions; use `xlrd<2.0` or libraries like `openpyxl` (for XLSX) or `xlwings` when processing legacy files. See also [Excel Spreadsheet (Legacy)](https://capdag.com/browse/media:xls).
